untranslatable_reason: Horn Top pattern requires multi-week structural analysis: (1) identification of two distinct upward spikes separated by exactly one week, (2) comparison of spike magnitudes against prior year historical data, (3) relative positioning above center week high. These require custom spike detection logic and year-over-year comparative analysis not available in standard indicators. The conversion uses overbought conditions (RSI>70) at price extremes (price_pos_20>0.8) during strong uptrend (ADX>25) as proxy for pattern formation, with confirmation via Donchian breakout below the pattern low (close<dc_lower). This approximation may miss true horn tops and generate false signals.
